validation_rules.Passport: Must have been issued within the last 10 years and be valid for at least 3 months after departure date.
validation_rules.Travel Insurance: Must cover medical expenses and repatriation of at least €30,000 EUR. Must cover all Schengen member states.
validation_rules.Accommodation: Must show hotel reservation, rental contract, or official invitation from a host in the destination state.
validation_rules.Flight Reservation: Must show roundtrip dummy booking or itinerary matching the requested travel dates.
validation_rules.Bank Statements: Must show sufficient funds to cover daily expense limits of the target country (varies e.g. €70-120/day).

critical_rules: Verify the travel medical insurance coverage is at least €30,000 EUR.
Passport must have been issued within 10 years (renewal stamps don't override this).
Accommodation and flight dates must match exactly.
ai_instructions: Verify travel insurance policy limits, check dates consistency across travel documents, and count blank visa pages.
pass_examples: Insurance covers €30,000, hotel booking and flight reservation match March 1-15 exactly, bank statement shows €3,000.
fail_examples: Insurance covers only €15,000, hotel checkout date is before flight departure date, passport is 11 years old.
